channel.title: Posts on Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Docs

item.title: ROS Python3
item.description: 错误介绍 在Python3中使用ROS会出现cv_bridge和tf报错问题 python 3.x - Unable to use cv_bridge with ROS Kinetic and Python3 - Stack Overflow python3 cv bridge报错 ImportError: dynamic module does not define module export function (PyInit_cv_bridge_boost) tf tf2报错 ImportError: dynamic module does not define module export function (PyInit__tf2) 解决的关键在于使用python3编译，可以通过下面参数进行cmake -DPYTHON_EXECUTABLE=/usr/bin/python3 -DPYTHON_INCLUDE_DIR=/usr/include/python3.6m -DPYTHON_LIBRARY=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.6m.so 这里介绍常用的catkin工具进行编译 ROS Wiki 介绍 ROS tf Package ROS cv_bridge Package CV Bridge 依赖 python-catkin-tools catkin工具 python3-dev 和 python3-catkin-pkg-modules 用于编译 python3-numpy 和 python3-yaml cv_bridge依赖

item.title: UUV Simulator
item.description: 0. 依赖 UUV Simulator安装依赖ROS和catkin工具 (1) ROS Ubuntu18.04对应ROS Melodic melodic/Installation/Ubuntu - ROS Wiki (2) catkin_tools sudo apt-get install python3-catkin-tools 1. 安装 源码安装基于 ROS Melodic 和 Gazebo9 的 uuv-simulator. (1) 创建ROS工作空间 mkdir -p ~/catkin_ws/src cd ~/catkin_ws/src (2) 初始化catkin工作空间 cd ~/catkin_ws catkin init (3) clone源码 cd ~/catkin_ws/src git clone https://github.com/uuvsimulator/uuv_simulator.git # clone 失败，使用国内 gitee 地址 git clone https://gitee.com/h_wanng/uuv_simulator.git (4) 安装 cd ~/catkin_ws rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src --rosdistro=melodic -y -- skip-keys "gazebo gazebo_msgs gazebo_plugins gazebo_ros gazebo_ros_control g azebo_ros_pkgs" (5) 编译 cd ~/catkin_ws catkin_make install Note: 编译报错多重试几次，大多和内存相关

item.title: ROS Melodic Installation
item.description: ROS Wiki ROS Melodic Installation 较简单，按官方文档进行安装。 Note 选择国内镜像源进行配置安装 安装完成在终端执行roscore测试安装情况 ROS Melodic Ubuntu (Melodic对应Ubuntu18) 选择配置国内(China)镜像源安装 roscore命令测试安装成功

item.title: 1st Post
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
